changelog:
v1.2.0 (2026-05-19)

[Render] Add external footage source mode for one-off source videos outside the footage library.
[Render] Tune external source compositing: clearer source video, lower blur, 0.58 image opacity cap.
[Render] Improve manual image mode: auto-detect A_tach.png next to A.png and overlay the cutout character clearly above the softened original image.
[Render] Add random stock-footage speed per job, default 0.6-0.9, while keeping long renders chunked for stability.
[Metadata] Store foreground image paths and selected footage speed for debugging.
